diffprimer
  • Summary
  • Charts
  • Genome Map
  • Data Table
  • Parameters

diffprimer Report

Interactive Analysis of Target-Specific PCR Primers
v0.1.2

Σ Summary

Designed Pairs

80

Specific Pairs

19

Non-Specific Pairs

61

Not Checked

0

◍ Visualizations

Amplicon Size Distribution

Distribution of predicted PCR amplicon lengths (bp).

Specificity Breakdown

Proportion of primers classified by specificity analysis.

Specific_LowGlobalSim: No off-target hit above similarity threshold.
Specific_PositionalMismatches: Similarity found, but 3' mismatches prevent amplification.
NonSpecific_Amplification: Will amplify an off-target sequence.

Off-Target Homology

Distribution of maximum percentage similarity between each amplicon region and the closest off-target sequence. Lower off-target homology percentages indicate that the selected amplicon is highly unique to the target region, reducing the chance of cross-reacting amplification in other parts of the genome.

Dimerization & Hairpin Risks

Thermodynamic propensity scores computed by Primer3 for secondary structures. Hairpin: tendency of a single primer to fold onto itself. Self-Any: tendency of two copies of the same primer to dimerize. Lower scores indicate lower risk. Values above 45°C may need attention.

Primer Parameter Space (Tm vs GC)

Each point represents a primer. Tight clustering indicates consistent thermodynamic properties across the designed set.

☰ Detailed Primer Data
